title: geraniospermum heterophyllum
intro: Geraniospermum heterophyllum, also known as Indian gentian or Longbranched gentian, is a plant species belonging to the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Geraniospermum heterophyllum include treating respiratory issues such as coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and powder, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
